caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on a political event involving Dr. Prem Kumar Nitesh. The scene shows a group of men in formal attire, with one individual, presumably Dr. Prem Kumar Nitesh, being interviewed by a reporter holding an ANI microphone. The man is gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating that he is addressing the media or making an important announcement. The background includes other individuals who seem to be part of the event, possibly government officials or party members. The text overlay in Hindi suggests that Dr. Prem Kumar Nitesh has been appointed as a minister in the government, and there is mention of a "sharp blow" to Tejashwi, likely referring to a political rival. The overall atmosphere suggests a significant political development being reported live.
